title: 1.1: Identifies the DATA completion boundary signal (e.g., 354 reply, 250 OK queued, accepted log entry)
1.2: Reports the baseline payload outcome (e.g., accepted msg_id ee83a859, 250 OK queued)
1.4: Reports the proxy-blocked payload prevention signature (e.g., DATA error unexpected EOF, aborted log entry)
1.5: Reports observed outcomes from repeated back-to-back attempts, describing what was noticed during testing (e.g., trial results, failure patterns, or their absence)
1.7: Reports the delivered message body content for smuggled messages (e.g., body='hello\\n', body='second\\n\\n')
